ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Abilene, TX) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population statistic entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in population compared to the previous year */,
  "total_population_change" INTEGER /* Total change in population compared to the previous year */,
  "births" INTEGER /* Number of births */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "international_immigration" INTEGER /* Number of international immigrants */,
  "domestic_migration" INTEGER /* Number of domestic migrants */,
  "age_median" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "sex_ratio" REAL /* Sex ratio of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population statistic entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population statistic entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "mapping_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population statistic entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population projection */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the projection */,
  "projected_population" INTEGER /* Projected population */,
  "confidence_interval_low" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_high" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "projection_method" TEXT /* Method used for projection (e.g., linear regression, exponential growth) */,
  "projection_date" TEXT /* Date when the projection was made */,
  "projection_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_projections_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration pattern */,
  "origin_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin region */,
  "destination_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination region */,
  "migration_type" TEXT /* Type of migration (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "migration_count" INTEGER /* Number of migrants */,
  "migration_year" INTEGER /* Year of migration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_patterns_destination_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_patterns_origin_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., urban, rural, coastal) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_categories_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population statistic entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population statistic entry */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("stat_id")
)
